description: You are a Global Operations Center (GOC) engineer responsible for standardizing metrics from legacy European datacenters into US-standard operational units. Create and save a Graphite dashboard named exactly 'GOC Standard Units' containing exactly four graphs. The graph titled 'Datacenter Temp (Fahrenheit)' must convert the Celsius metric `servers.datacenter.machine_temperature` to Fahrenheit and use the alias 'Temp F'. The graph titled 'Network Ingress (MB)' must convert `servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in` from Bytes to Megabytes and use the alias 'Ingress MB'. The graph titled 'LB Request Rate' must convert the cumulative counter `servers.load_balancer.requests.count` to a rate and use the alias 'Requests/Interval'. The graph titled 'Web Speed Ratio' must calculate the ratio of `servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1` to `servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_2` and use the alias 'Speed Ratio'. All dashboard and graph names must match the requirements exactly.
